docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO OCT-18-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE UNFILED PROOF OF SERVICE WAS SUBMITTED THE CALLING OF THE CASE. PER CCP 116.340C THE PROOF OF SERVICE SHALL BE FILED AT LEAST FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. NO FURTHER PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL EVERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXLANDER LEFF IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL EVERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER LEFF IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVERS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEFF, ALEXANDER
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $110.41 ACCRUED INTEREST, $1,047.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LEFF, ALEXANDER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE STATED) SERVED JUL-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEFF, ALEXANDER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVERS, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEFF, ALEXANDER $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY NOT LATER THAN NOVEMBER 20, 2017 DELIVER BACK TO PLAINTIFF THE TABLE WITH ORIGINAL PACKAGING WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY EVERS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEFF, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $11,701.73 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON 11/27/2017. AS TO DEFENDANT LEFF, ALEXANDER
